title: AN ACT ENTITLED "AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 18 OF EACH YEAR AS NAGA CITY CHARTER DAY AND SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF NAGA IN ORDER TO COMMEMORATE THE CHARTER ANNIVERSARY OF THE SAID CITY". THEREBY REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9089, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
H. No. 2932 / 99 OG No. 32, 5014 (Aug. 11, 2003)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9210, June 11, 2003 ]

AN ACT ENTITLED "AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 18 OF EACH YEAR AS NAGA CITY CHARTER DAY AND SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF NAGA IN ORDER TO COMMEMORATE THE CHARTER ANNIVERSARY OF THE SAID CITY". THEREBY REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9089, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. In order to communicate the charter anniversary of the City of Naga, June 18 each year is hereby declared as Naga City Charter Day and a special nonworking holiday in the said city.

SEC. 2. This Act shall repeal Republic Act No. 9089.

SEC. 2. This Act shall repeal Republic Act No. 9089.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 23, 2003 and January 22, 2003, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: JUN 11 2003

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
